item.title: nottmtails: Paul Taylor @nottmtails · 42s Bednarek with a high challenge that catches Wood right on the knee. It is a bad challenge
item.description: Paul Taylor @nottmtails · 42s Bednarek with a high challenge that catches Wood right on the knee. It is a bad challenge and VAR are having a look. But Wood has felt that one. He has needed treatment #NFFC 3 11

item.title: J_Tanswell: The Athletic | Football reposteó Jacob Tanswell @J_Tanswell · 5min Another European night at Villa Park. “Dream On” by A
item.description:
The Athletic | Football reposteó Jacob Tanswell @J_Tanswell · 5min Another European night at Villa Park. “Dream On” by Aerosmith plays as the Tifo unfurls.
#AVFC have a chance to progress into the final four - and, perhaps, it won’t start to feel like a dream for much longer…
First, though, Bologna. 3 2 44 2 mil

item.title: kierangill_DM: Kieran Gill reposteó Kieran Gill @kierangill_DM · 2h When I interviewed Caicedo in November, he told me he'd like a new
item.description: Kieran Gill reposteó Kieran Gill @kierangill_DM · 2h When I interviewed Caicedo in November, he told me he'd like a new contract with Chelsea. Took nearly six months, but 24yo is now set for his extension, and Colwill could follow. Story here: De dailymail.co.uk 2 7 54 3 mil

item.title: JacobsBen: Ben Jacobs reposteó Ben Jacobs @JacobsBen · 6h Exclusive: Richard Hughes won't leave #LFC this summer and will lead a co
item.description:
Ben Jacobs reposteó Ben Jacobs @JacobsBen · 6h Exclusive: Richard Hughes won't leave #LFC this summer and will lead a continued revamp, with 3-4 senior players set to arrive.
Al-Hilal interest genuine, but FSG want Hughes to stay.
More on @talkSPORT shortly.
@alex_crook 150 339 2 mil 273 mil
